gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/523)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/523)

parts.text: عَامِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جُذَاعَةَ

text: مَا مِنْ عَبْدٍ يَقْرَأُ آخِرَ الْكَهْفِ إِلَّا تَيَقَّظَ فِي السَّاعَةِ الَّتِي يُرِيدُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad Al Nahdy, from Muhammad Bin Al Waleed, from Aban, from Aamir Bin Abdullah Bin Juza’at,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is none from a servant who recites the end of (Surah) Al-Kahf except he will wake up in the time which he intended to’.
en.sarwar: 21. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad al-Nahdi from Muhammad ibn al-Walid from Aban from ‘Amir ibn ‘Abd Allah ibn Jadha’h from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever reads the last verse of al-Kahf (Chapter 18) can wake up at night at the hour that he intends to wake up.”
